title: Trnava, Trnava Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Trnava, Trnava Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Trnava is a city in Trnava Region with a population of 64,735. Little Rome of Slovakia, a city of beautiful Baroque churches and religious architecture, with a historic old town and a growing automotive and electronics industry.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
